summary: ANDROID | Falcon Grey | EQ settings not saved for Custom
scenario: Custom EQ settings are not persisted after saving and reopening the EQ settings page
description_clean: Custom EQ settings are not saved after clicking Save and reopening the EQ settings page. Steps: Connect device, go to EQ settings, make changes, click Save, reopen EQ settings. Observed: Settings are not saved. Expected: Settings are saved.
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Connect to a supported Poly Bluetooth audio device.
3. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
4. Make custom adjustments to the EQ bands (e.g., increase bass, adjust mids/treble).
5. Tap the Save button to save the custom EQ settings.
6. Exit the Equalizer settings page (e.g., tap Back or navigate away).
7. Reopen the Equalizer settings page via Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
expected: The custom EQ settings (band adjustments) are saved and displayed as previously configured when reopening the Equalizer settings page.
actual: The custom EQ settings are not saved; the EQ bands revert to default/flat values when reopening the Equalizer settings page.
